en: You did great. / Good job.
notes: "Good job." はアメリカで非常によく使う。上から目線にならない

en: As expected from you. / That's so you.
notes: "That's so you." =「さすがあなたらしい」

en: That looks good. / That's looking nice.
notes: "looking good" は進行中の作業にも使える

en: You have good taste.
notes: "taste" =「センス／好み」。"sense" は使わない

en: That looks great on you. / That suits you.
notes: "on you" で「あなたに似合う」。服・髪型などに

en: I'm rooting for you. / I've got your back.
notes: "root for" =「応援する」。"got your back" =「味方だよ」

en: You'll be fine. / It'll work out.
notes: "work out" =「うまくいく」

en: Believe in yourself. / Trust yourself.
notes: ストレートな励まし

en: Don't overthink it. / Don't worry too much.
notes: "overthink" =「考えすぎる」

en: You're doing enough. / You're doing great.
notes: 頑張りすぎている人への声かけ

jp: その調子でいいと思う。
en: Keep it up. / You're on the right track.
notes: "on the right track" =「正しい方向に進んでいる」

jp: 前より全然よくなってる。
en: You've improved so much. / Way better than before.
notes: "way better" =「全然良い」のカジュアル強調

jp: 誰でもそういう時はある。
en: Everyone goes through that. / It happens to everyone.
notes: "go through" =「経験する」

en: You've got this. / I know you can do it.
notes: "You've got this." はネイティブが非常によく使う励まし

jp: それ正解だったと思うよ。
en: I think you made the right call.
notes: "make the right call" =「正しい判断をする」

jp: いい判断だったと思う。
en: That was a good call.
notes: "good call" =「いい判断」

en: I should learn from you. / I look up to you.
notes: "look up to" =「尊敬する／見習う」

en: I really respect that. / I admire that.
notes: "respect" は人にも行動にも使える

en: Cheer up. / Hang in there.
notes: "Hang in there." =「頑張って耐えて」。励ましの定番

en: There's always next time.
notes: 失敗後の励ましの定番

en: It's okay to fail. / It's not the end of the world.
notes: "not the end of the world" =「世界が終わるわけじゃない」

jp: そんなに自分を責めないで。
en: Don't be so hard on yourself.
notes: "be hard on yourself" =「自分に厳しくする」。定番表現

en: Well done. / You did well.
notes: "Well done." はイギリス英語でも好まれる
